channel.title: Forescout Technologies — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Forescout Technologies (forescout).

item.title: CVE-2025-4660 · 8.7 HIGH — Remote Code Execution in Windows Secure Connector/ HPS Inspection Engine via Insecure Named Pipe Access
item.description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the Windows agent component of SecureConnector due to improper access controls on a named pipe. The pipe is accessible to the Everyone group and does not restrict remote connections, allowing any networ…

item.title: CVE-2024-9950 · 8.5 HIGH — Abuse of Unauthenticated Compliance Recheck in SecureConnector
item.description: A vulnerability in Forescout SecureConnector v11.3.07.0109 on Windows allows unauthenticated user to modify compliance scripts due to insecure temporary directory.

item.title: CVE-2024-9949 · 5.8 MEDIUM — Denial of Service in Forescout SecureConnector
item.description: Denial of Service in Forescout SecureConnector 11.1.02.1019 on Windows allows Unprivileged user to corrupt the configuration file and cause Denial of Service in the application.
